text.title: Workflow Design Phase Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of the design.md frontmatter + section index for workflow-design-phase. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner plural; AD-1 has no rejected alternatives; file_table entry is vague; fr_coverage empty.

forbidden.pattern: An AD-X with `rejected` empty — hides the actual decision.
file_table row with path `various` or scope short and uninformative — non-actionable.
`fr_coverage` keys do not cover every FR-X from spec.md.
Status `Draft` passed to writing-implementation-plans — must be Accepted first.
